# Documentation issue

## Document path

Provide the affected file or target area.

## Problem

Describe what is unclear, missing or outdated.

## Proposed correction

Describe the desired update.

## Related runtime area

```text
[ ] architecture
[ ] installation/service
[ ] release status
[ ] hardening/production readiness
[ ] contracts/configuration
[ ] tests/tools
[ ] GitHub repository governance
```

## Acceptance criteria

```text
[ ] The document is clear for a new maintainer.
[ ] The release status remains honest.
[ ] Security-sensitive details are not exposed.
```
